[FE - Partner Portal].summary: Integrate Salesforce Chat Widget - Partner Portal (Authenticated)
[FE - Partner Portal].description:
Integrate Salesforce Chat widget on the Partner Portal for authenticated users (live merchants).

Requirements:
- Identify users as live merchants
- Route them through the AI chatbot experience that currently exists on Zendesk
- Ensure seamless integration with existing authentication system
- Maintain user context and session information

[FE - Partner Onboarding Portal].summary: Integrate Salesforce Chat Widget - Partner Onboarding Portal (Authenticated)
[FE - Partner Onboarding Portal].description:
Integrate Salesforce Chat widget on the Partner Onboarding Portal for authenticated users (onboarding merchants).

Requirements:
- Identify users as onboarding users
- Direct hand-off to Partner Onboarding team (no chatbot, direct transfer)
- Ensure proper routing based on user status
- Maintain user context during handoff

[FE - Support Website Partner].summary: Integrate Salesforce Chat Widget - Support Website Partner Section (Non-authenticated)
[FE - Support Website Partner].description:
Integrate Salesforce Chat widget on support.tamara.co Partner section for non-authenticated users.

Requirements:
- Chat widget should open on Partner section
- Present segmentation prompt: "Tell us whether you're a" with options:
  * "New merchant in the signup process" → Direct handoff to Onboarding Support
  * "An existing merchant" → Enter Partner AI Chatbot (non-authenticated mode)
- For existing merchants: Only allow handoff for Login/Access issues or Fraud reports
- Support both English and Arabic languages
- Implement routing logic as per detailed flow diagrams

[FE - Partner Portal Pre-login].summary: Integrate Salesforce Chat Widget - Partner Portal Pre-login (Non-authenticated)
[FE - Partner Portal Pre-login].description:
Integrate Salesforce Chat widget on partners.tamara.co pre-login page for non-authenticated users.

Requirements:
- Chat widget available before login
- Present segmentation prompt: "Tell us whether you're a" with options:
  * "New merchant in the signup process" → Direct handoff to Onboarding Support
  * "An existing merchant" → Enter Partner AI Chatbot (non-authenticated mode)
- For existing merchants: Only allow handoff for Login/Access issues or Fraud reports
- Support both English and Arabic languages
- Implement routing logic as per detailed flow diagrams

[FE - Web App Elisa].summary: Integrate Salesforce Chat Widget - Web App Elisa (Non-authenticated)
[FE - Web App Elisa].description:
Integrate Salesforce Chat widget on the web app (Elisa) for non-authenticated customer experience.

Requirements:
- Chat widget available for non-logged-in users
- Proper integration with existing Elisa chatbot infrastructure
- Maintain consistent user experience
- Support customer-facing chat functionality

[FE - Mobile App].summary: Integrate Salesforce Chat Widget - Mobile App (Non-authenticated)
[FE - Mobile App].description:
Integrate Salesforce Chat widget on mobile apps for non-authenticated customer experience.

Requirements:
- Chat widget available for non-logged-in mobile users
- Support both iOS and Android platforms
- Proper integration with mobile app architecture
- Maintain consistent user experience across platforms

[FE - Support Website Customer].summary: Integrate Salesforce Chat Widget - Support Website Customer Section (Non-authenticated)
[FE - Support Website Customer].description:
Integrate Salesforce Chat widget on support.tamara.co Customer section for non-authenticated users.

Requirements:
- Chat widget available on customer support section
- Proper routing and user experience
- Support customer-facing chat functionality
- Maintain consistency with other support channels
